g.title: pwiz_module_detail
g.text: one node per .cpp/.hpp pair (test fixtures omitted); each group is its own row, top-to-bottom

a.xlink:title: Per-AA residue masses + properties (composition, hydrophobicity, pKa). Ported as Util/Proteome/AminoAcid.cs.
PTM record (name, mono/avg delta, formula, AA specificity). Ported as Util/Proteome/Modification.cs.
ProteomeData equality with named-reason output. Ported as Common/Proteome/ProteomeDataDiff.cs.
Peptide sequence + mass model + Modifications list. Ported as Util/Proteome/Peptide.cs.
Pass-through ProteinList for subclassing. Ported as Common/Proteome/ProteinListWrapper.cs.
Top-level ProteomeData document + Protein + ProteinList + ProteinListSimple. Ported as Common/Proteome/ProteomeData.cs. IDisposable so lazy-FASTA callers can scope ownership with `using var`.
Format-detecting Read + format-selecting Write (FASTA by extension or content sniff). Ported as Common/Proteome/ProteomeDataFile.cs.
Enzyme cleavage rules + iterator. Ported as Common/Proteome/Digestion.cs (CVID-keyed so it lives in Common, not Util).
MRU cache over a ProteinList — meta-only or meta-plus-sequence modes. Ported as Common/Proteome/ProteinListCache.cs.
FASTA defline + sequence parser; IPI-aware id regex. Ported as Common/Proteome/Fasta.Read / ReadFile / OpenLazy. Lazy path goes through FastaProteinList (per-protein seek via .index sidecar).
Reader_FASTA registration into the IReader dispatcher. NOT PORTED — no dispatcher wired for proteome yet.

FASTA writer + .index sidecar (BinaryIndexStream). Ported as Common/Proteome/Fasta.Write + FastaProteinList. The .index sidecar is byte-compatible with cpp pwiz (SHA-1-hashed ids, populated 48-byte file-size + SHA-1 prelude).
IReader interface for ProteomeData. NOT PORTED — only Reader_FASTA matters and Fasta.OpenLazy / ReadFile bypass the dispatcher.
Pretty-print text dump of ProteomeData. WON'T PORT — Format_Text output isn't wired in pwiz-sharp.
Hard-coded ProteomeData fixtures for cpp tests. WON'T PORT — fixtures built inline in tests instead.
